who: HR managers in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR, monitoring 50-100 employees
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR, processing 50-100 employees, inaccurate attendance data causes payroll errors. We provide attendance monitoring instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate attendance data leading to payroll errors
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on similar attendance issues
DM outreach to HR managers with a demo video
Community forums where HR managers share tools
try_it: Let users try real-time attendance monitoring on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showcasing manual attendance tracking
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing employee data
One-click export of simple attendance reports
